profile.name: Lahari Nanduru
profile.title: Data Analyst Intern
profile.summary: Lahari Nanduru is a detail-driven data analyst with experience in data visualization and team collaboration. She is skilled in programming languages such as C, C++, Python, and SQL. Lahari is currently pursuing her B.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering at SRM University AP.

responsibilities: Analyzed and cleaned datasets using tools like Excel/SQL to extract actionable insights for business decision-making. Built dashboards and reports to visualize trends, improving data-driven strategies and performance tracking. Collaborated with remote teams to process data, identify patterns, and support analytical projects.

projects.title: SkillXChange – Student Skill Exchange Platform
projects.description: Built a full-stack web platform enabling peer-to-peer skill exchange among students without monetary transactions. Developed using React, Tailwind CSS, Node.js, Express, and MongoDB Atlas. Implemented email-restricted authentication to ensure secure access for SRM AP students. Designed a skill-matching system connecting users based on teaching and learning interests. Created features like connection requests, real-time chat/call support, and campus navigation.

projects.title: VILLAGE GEODATA SaaS PLATFORM
projects.description: Developed a production-ready API platform providing structured access to 600K+ location records (villages to states). Designed a normalized PostgreSQL database (3NF) for efficient hierarchical data management and scalability. Implemented secure B2B access using API key authentication, JWT, and rate limiting. Built high-performance search and filtering APIs with Redis caching and optimized indexing. Created an admin dashboard for usage analytics and API monitoring, along with a demo client application.
